en: When Jesus had spoken these words, he went out with his disciples across the Kidron Valley, where there was a garden, which he and his disciples entered.
zh: 耶穌說完了這些話，就和門徒出去，過了汲淪溪。在那裡有一個園子，耶穌和門徒進去了。

en: Now Judas, who betrayed him, also knew the place, for Jesus often met there with his disciples.
zh: 出賣耶穌的猶大也知道那地方，因為耶穌和門徒常常在那裡聚集。

en: So Judas, having procured a band of soldiers and some officers from the chief priests and the Pharisees, went there with lanterns and torches and weapons.
zh: 那時，猶大帶著一隊兵，還有祭司長和法利賽人的差役，拿著燈籠、火把、武器，來到園子裡。

en: Then Jesus, knowing all that would happen to him, came forward and said to them, "Whom do you seek?"
zh: 耶穌知道快要臨到他身上的一切事，就出來對他們說：“你們找誰？”

en: They answered him, "Jesus of Nazareth." Jesus said to them, "I am he." Judas, who betrayed him, was standing with them.
zh: 他們回答：“拿撒勒人耶穌！”耶穌說：“我就是。”出賣耶穌的猶大和他們站在那裡。

en: When Jesus said to them, "I am he," they drew back and fell to the ground.
zh: 耶穌一說“我就是”，他們就往後退，倒在地上。

en: So he asked them again, "Whom do you seek?" And they said, "Jesus of Nazareth."
zh: 他再問他們：“你們找誰？”他們說：“拿撒勒人耶穌！”

en: Jesus answered, "I told you that I am he. So, if you seek me, let these men go."
zh: 耶穌回答：“我已經告訴你們，我就是了。如果你們來找我，就讓這些人走吧。”

en: This was to fulfill the word that he had spoken: "Of those whom you gave me I have lost not one."
zh: 這應驗了耶穌說過的話：“你賜給我的人，我一個也沒有失落。”

en: Then Simon Peter, having a sword, drew it and struck the high priest's servant and cut off his right ear. (The servant's name was Malchus.)
zh: 西門．彼得帶著一把刀，就拔出來，向大祭司的僕人馬勒古砍去，削掉他的右耳。

en: So Jesus said to Peter, "Put your sword into its sheath; shall I not drink the cup that the Father has given me?"
zh: 耶穌對彼得說：“把刀收入鞘裡去！父給我的杯，我怎能不喝呢？”

en: So the band of soldiers and their captain and the officers of the Jews arrested Jesus and bound him.
zh: 於是那一隊兵和千夫長，以及猶太人的差役拿住耶穌，把他綁起來，

en: First they led him to Annas, for he was the father-in-law of Caiaphas, who was high priest that year.
zh: 先帶到亞那面前。亞那是當年的大祭司該亞法的岳父。

en: It was Caiaphas who had advised the Jews that it would be expedient that one man should die for the people.
zh: 該亞法就是從前向猶太人提議說“一個人代替人民死，這是有益的”那個人。

en: Simon Peter followed Jesus, and so did another disciple. Since that disciple was known to the high priest, he entered with Jesus into the court of the high priest,
zh: 西門．彼得和另一個門徒跟著耶穌；那門徒是大祭司認識的。他跟耶穌一起進了大祭司的院子，

en: but Peter stood outside at the door. So the other disciple, who was known to the high priest, went out and spoke to the servant girl who kept watch at the door, and brought Peter in.
zh: 彼得卻站在門外。大祭司所認識的那門徒出來，對看門的婢女說了一聲，就帶了彼得進去。

en: The servant girl at the door said to Peter, "You also are not one of this man's disciples, are you?" He said, "I am not."
zh: 那看門的婢女對彼得說：“你不也是這個人的門徒嗎？”他說：“我不是。”

en: Now the servants and officers had made a charcoal fire, because it was cold, and they were standing and warming themselves. Peter also was with them, standing and warming himself.
zh: 因為天氣寒冷，僕人和差役就生了炭火，站著取暖；彼得也和他們站在一起取暖。

en: The high priest then questioned Jesus about his disciples and his teaching.
zh: 那時，大祭司查問耶穌有關他的門徒和他的教訓的事。

en: Jesus answered him, "I have spoken openly to the world. I have always taught in synagogues and in the temple, where all Jews come together. I have said nothing in secret.
zh: 耶穌對大祭司說：“我向來對世人講話都是公開的，我常常在會堂和聖殿裡，就是在所有猶太人聚集的地方教導人，暗地裡我並沒有講甚麼。

en: Why do you ask me? Ask those who have heard me what I said to them; they know what I said."
zh: 你為甚麼查問我呢？問問那些聽過我講話的人吧，他們知道我講過甚麼。”

en: When he had said these things, one of the officers standing by struck Jesus with his hand, saying, "Is that how you answer the high priest?"
zh: 耶穌說了這些話，站在旁邊的一個差役，就打他一巴掌，說：“你竟敢這樣回答大祭司嗎？”

en: Jesus answered him, "If what I said is wrong, bear witness about the wrong; but if what I said is right, why do you strike me?"
zh: 耶穌對他說：“如果我講錯了，你可以指證錯在哪裡；如果我講對了，你為甚麼打我呢？”

en: Annas then sent him bound to Caiaphas the high priest.
zh: 亞那仍然綁著耶穌，把他押到大祭司該亞法那裡去。

en: Now Simon Peter was standing and warming himself. So they said to him, "You also are not one of his disciples, are you?" He denied it and said, "I am not."
zh: 西門．彼得仍然站在火旁取暖。有人對他說：“你不也是他的門徒嗎？”彼得否認說：“我不是。”

en: One of the servants of the high priest, a relative of the man whose ear Peter had cut off, asked, "Did I not see you in the garden with him?"
zh: 有一個大祭司的僕人，就是彼得削掉耳朵的那個人的親戚，說：“我不是看見你跟他在園子裡嗎？”

en: Peter again denied it, and at once a rooster crowed.
zh: 彼得又否認，立刻雞就叫了。

en: Then they led Jesus from the house of Caiaphas to the governor's headquarters. It was early morning. They themselves did not enter the governor's headquarters, so that they would not be defiled, but could eat the Passover.
zh: 清早的時候，猶太人把耶穌從該亞法那裡押往總督的官邸。他們自己沒有進到官邸裡去，恐怕沾染了污穢，不能吃逾越節的晚餐。

en: So Pilate went outside to them and said, "What accusation do you bring against this man?"
zh: 於是彼拉多走到外面見他們，說：“你們控告這個人甚麼呢？”

en: They answered him, "If this man were not doing evil, we would not have delivered him over to you."
zh: 他們回答：“如果這個人沒有作惡，我們就不會把他交給你。”

en: Pilate said to them, "Take him yourselves and judge him by your own law." The Jews said to him, "It is not lawful for us to put anyone to death."
zh: 彼拉多對他們說：“你們自己把他帶去，按著你們的律法審問他吧。”猶太人說：“我們沒有權去判人死罪。”

en: This was to fulfill the word that Jesus had spoken to show by what kind of death he was going to die.
zh: 這就應驗了耶穌預先說到自己將要怎樣死的那句話。

en: So Pilate entered his headquarters again and called Jesus and said to him, "Are you the King of the Jews?"
zh: 彼拉多又進了官邸，把耶穌叫來，問他說：“你是猶太人的王嗎？”

en: Jesus answered, "Do you say this of your own accord, or did others say it to you about me?"
zh: 耶穌回答：“這話是你自己說的，還是別人對你說到我的呢？”

en: Pilate answered, "Am I a Jew? Your own nation and the chief priests have delivered you over to me. What have you done?"
zh: 彼拉多說：“難道我是猶太人嗎？你本國的人和祭司長把你交給我，你究竟作了甚麼事？”

en: Jesus answered, "My kingdom is not of this world. If my kingdom were of this world, my servants would have been fighting, that I might not be delivered over to the Jews. But my kingdom is not from the world."
zh: 耶穌回答：“我的國不屬於這世界；如果我的國屬於這世界，我的臣僕就要作戰，使我不至被交給猶太人。不過，我的國不是這世上的。”

en: Then Pilate said to him, "So you are a king?" Jesus answered, "You say that I am a king. For this purpose I was born and for this purpose I have come into the world- to bear witness to the truth. Everyone who is of the truth listens to my voice."
zh: 於是彼拉多問他：“那麼，你是王嗎？”耶穌說：“我是王，你已經說了 。我要為真理作見證，我為此而生，也為此來到世上。凡是屬於真理的人，都聽我的聲音。”

en: Pilate said to him, "What is truth?" After he had said this, he went back outside to the Jews and told them, "I find no guilt in him.
zh: 彼拉多問他：“真理是甚麼？” 彼拉多說了這話，又出來見猶太人，對他們說：“我查不出他有甚麼罪。

en: But you have a custom that I should release one man for you at the Passover. So do you want me to release to you the King of the Jews?"
zh: 你們有個慣例，每逢逾越節，要我給你們釋放一個囚犯。你們願意我給你們釋放這個猶太人的王嗎？”

en: They cried out again, "Not this man, but Barabbas!" Now Barabbas was a robber.
zh: 他們又喊叫說：“不要他！要巴拉巴！”這巴拉巴是個強盜。
